scripts.build:nlp:data: node scripts/migrate_to_alphabet.js && mkdir -p assets/nlp/data/legacy assets/nlp/data/wordnet assets/nlp/data/verbnet && cp -r vendors/nlp-pt-br-lite/src/data/legacy/*.json assets/nlp/data/legacy/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: npm run build:nlp:data && npm run build:core
